real_questions.text: Do you maintain leverage below your defined ceiling under stress, and are your asset coverage cushions sufficient to absorb four quarters of maximum redemptions and valuation declines simultaneously?

common_pitfalls.text: Preparing for a single-quarter shock — Fitch's BDC stress construct is a sustained four-quarter drawdown of maximum redemptions and valuation declines at the same time.

strong_answer_markers.text: Has the four-quarter redemption + valuation-decline stress pre-run, with leverage and asset coverage results ready to show.
